section.heading: Nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: contracts with other agencies and instrumentalities to provide or obtain goods and services

content.p: The Coast Guard Exchange System, or a morale, welfare, and recreation system of the Coast Guard, may enter into a contract or other agreement with any element or instrumentality of the Coast Guard or with another Federal department, agency, or instrumentality to provide or obtain goods and services beneficial to the efficient management and operation of the Coast Guard Exchange System or that morale, welfare, and recreation system.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 713 was renumbered section 3714 of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2018—Pub. L. 115–282 renumbered section 152 of this title as this section.
